name: vendor.myndhyve.ads-image-generate
description: MyndHyve ads.image.generate — generate ad creative images via the host's ctx.callImageGenerator (host.aiProviders.imageGeneration sub-capability from spec PR #48). Batches N prompts through one host call each, computes per-placement dimensions from caller-supplied placementSpec, applies platform/style/brand-color prompt enhancement, and aggregates safety-filter stats. First consumer of the new sub-capability.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Generate Ad Images
nodes.description: Batches inputs.prompts[] through ctx.callImageGenerator. Per-placement dimensions resolved from inputs.placementSpec.imageSpec (recommendedWidth/Height, capped at config.maxDimension) or fallback to inputs.aspectRatio + maxDimension. Each prompt enhanced with platform/placement/style/brandColors context. Aborts mid-batch on ctx.signal. Returns assets[] + per-prompt stats + total filtered count.
